name: CanBas Co., Ltd.
summary: CanBas Co., Ltd., a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company, develops therapeutics for cancer patients. The company develops CBP501, a calmodulin modulator for the treatment of tumors. It also develops CBS9106, a small molecule reversible inhibitor of Exportin-1 that is in Phase I clinical trial for the treatment of solid tumors. The company has a collaboration alliance with Stemline Therapeutics, Inc. CanBas Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Numazu, Japan.
